# fill

Tap then type

## Usage

```bash
agent-device fill <x> <y> <text> | fill <@ref|selector> <text>
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--depth, -d <depth>`: Snapshot: limit snapshot depth
- `--scope, -s <scope>`: Snapshot: scope snapshot to label/identifier
- `--raw`: Snapshot: raw node output
- `--delay-ms <ms>`: Delay between typed characters

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
